summary: A recorded Real America's Voice remote interview, posted by the USCIS Director, in a three-box split screen for the program 'Just the News, No Noise' with hosts John Solomon and Amanda Head. A female host sits at left, the USCIS Director joins by video in the center wearing glasses, a dark suit and a yellow tie with an American-flag lapel pin, and a male guest joins at right, both against night city-skyline backdrops. A lower-third chyron reads 'JUST THE NEWS, NO NOISE / With John Solomon & Amanda Head' and a headline ticker runs along the bottom. The narration concerns immigration fraud and USCIS deploying special agents. The audio is broadcast interview speech.

script.scene: Three-box split: a female host at left, the USCIS Director by video center in a dark suit and yellow tie, a male guest at right; chyron 'JUST THE NEWS, NO NOISE / With John Solomon & Amanda Head'.
The same three-box layout continues as the Director speaks; a headline ticker scrolls along the bottom.

notable_text: JUST THE NEWS, NO NOISE; With John Solomon & Amanda Head; REAL AMERICA'S VOICE
